description: Pool deck replacement and waterproofing on the fourth floor of the building. Scope will include isolated removal and replacement of existing topping slab and waterproofing as well as removal and replacement of surrounding pool deck and planters.

Dry in. Remove and replace rotted and damaged soffit and facia from Hurricane Ida. Remove 284 squares of mansard roof and replace with metal R panel roofing panels. Remove 400 squares of existing siding and replace with hardy plank siding. Remove any rotted sheathing and weatherproof. Remove iron basket stairwells and replace with new risers and treads. Paint throughout.

Repaint of Existing Building, Restoration of Windows, Siding Repair, New Awning. NO USE OR OCCUPANCY. RENOVATION REQUIRES SEPARATE PERMIT. Failure to secure the proper permits or proceed with work outside the scope of this permit will subject the property to additional fees, fines, adjudication and penalties. Call for inspection at (504)658-7200 or email: inspections@nola.gov to request a final inspection with the permit number.

The Isidore Newman School Jefferson Building Restoration/Renovation centers on the partial renovation of the Jefferson Building with connections to the Saratoga Building. Improvements include partial demolition of interior partitions to restore historic architectural features and provide new office and student spaces. The project includes mechanical, electrical, plumbing, and fire protection systems in selected areas of the Jefferson and Saratoga buildings. Exterior renovations consist of façade refinishing work of plaster, a limited scope of window and door replacement, roof repair with dormer additions, and remodeling an outdoor courtyard. BACKFLOW PREVENTION REVIEW REQUIRED PRIOR TO INSPECTIONS BEING ACCEPTED
